title: Weekly comment: Enter the Fall
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias

Week
One thing school children and traders have in common? Last week saw the further retrenchment of the S&P 500 below the 4000-point mark as markets continued to digest more hawkish comments by the Fed. Meanwhile, the US 10y bond is back above 3.1% as the sell-off was wide.
